identity.name: Button
identity.description: Stable PrimeNG-backed action wrapper used by current applications and remotes.

inputs.name: icon
inputs.description: Deprecated PrimeIcons class string; use iconName.

inputs.name: iconName
inputs.description: Governed icon identifier absorbed from ps-button-candidate.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: Legacy tone, styleClass, outlined, text, routerLink, PrimeIcons strings, and buttonClick remain supported only until the next major release.

identity.name: Button Contract Exploration
identity.description: Opinionated PrimeNG facade exposing product intent while keeping provider controls private.

knownLimitations: Figma property mapping and manual screen-reader review remain pending.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: The contract is proposed and remains pending design-system approval.

identity.name: Card
identity.description: Token-driven content surface with optional heading content.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: No dedicated automated behavior evidence is recorded.

identity.name: Checkbox
identity.description: Native checkbox and switch wrapper with label, help text, disabled, invalid, and required states.

inputs.name: fieldId
inputs.description: Stable label and description relationship identifier.

knownLimitations: Figma property mapping and manual screen-reader review remain pending.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

behaviors: switch role for the switch variant
required, invalid, help, and error relationships

identity.name: Dialog
identity.description: Native governed modal with labelled semantics, contained focus, dismissal, and opener restoration.

knownLimitations: Configurable initial focus, stacked dialogs, Figma alignment, and manual assistive-technology review remain pending.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

behaviors: light and dark modal token inheritance

warnings: Stacked or nested dialogs are unsupported.
A dedicated semantic backdrop token is not yet recorded.

identity.description: Opinionated PrimeNG select facade with an internal body-overlay policy.

inputs.description: Stable label and description relationship identifier.

knownLimitations: Richer option content, Figma alignment, and manual assistive-technology review remain pending.
The wrapper synchronizes aria-disabled from PrimeNG provider state because the rendered option omits it.

light and dark overlay token inheritance

identity.name: Toast Service
identity.description: Public service API for creating governed toast messages via add(message: PublicToastMessage) and remove(id: number); messages() exposes the current queue as a readonly signal.

findings.summary: Stable Button keyboard activation and focus behavior have dedicated automated evidence.
Stable Button exposes loading semantics and suppresses repeated activation; manual announcement verification remains pending.
Background content is made inert while the modal is open and restored on close.
Body scrolling is locked while the modal is open and restored on close.
The public Dialog description input provides a verified aria-describedby relationship.
Stacked or nested Dialog behavior is undefined.
Disabled options suppress selection and expose aria-disabled through the governed wrapper.
Required, invalid, help, and error states use a provider-neutral API with verified combobox relationships.
Manual screen-reader reviews are not recorded for the flagship components.
Automated forced-colors evidence verifies visible boundaries and focus for the flagship components.
The approved ps-button target uses intent, appearance, disabled, loading, governed icons, and activated; compatibility aliases remain supported until the next major release.
The canonical selector family is ps-*; legacy public-* aliases remain supported until the next major release.
Public API extraction was partial for four exported entries; all four now have complete documented inputs, outputs, or service methods and public types in the manifest.
Provider-wrapper, native, and Angular CDK selection criteria are recorded for Button, Select, and Dialog.
Native and composite components consume PrimeNG --p-* variables directly instead of depending only on the public --ps-* token contract.
